== Notes for [[Item:Q86226|Q86226]] ==

[https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gaius_Asinius_Pollio_(consul_23) Wikipedia - Gaius Asinius Pollio (consul 23)]

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F2940A2F4C21EFBBE49822EF79916C3F54
geni:6000000030545681333

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
